title: dioscorea bulbifera var. heterophylla
intro: Dioscorea bulbifera var. heterophylla, also known as the air potato, is a type of perennial vine native to Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, derived from its tubers and leaves. The health benefits of Dioscorea bulbifera var. heterophylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as diabetes and cardiovascular disease. Dioscorea bulbifera var. heterophylla is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried or powdered for use in traditional medicine and supplements.
